title: September 2024: The Kenai Peninsula’s Autumn Angling Spectacle
summary: As the vibrant tapestry of Alaskan summer begins to yield to the rich hues of autumn, September on the Kenai Peninsula offers a serene yet exciting chapter for anglers. This month is a celebration of diversity, with the waters brimming with various salmon species wrapping up their runs and the spotlight beginning to shift towards the feisty rainbow trout...
